full_text:
Fan Shen (Xiaojing) 范慎 (孝敬)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Shen (范慎), styledXiaojing (孝敬). Officer of Sun Deng, noted for great but narrow mind. He was made Grand Commandant in 271. Fan Shen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Fan Shen lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
